drug_name: Thera Plus Maximum Strength Feminine Anti-Itch
active_ingredients: Active ingredients Benzocaine 20% Resorcinol 3% Purpose External Analgesic
dosage_and_administration: Directions Adults and children 12 years and older: apply a fingertip amount (approximately 1 inch strip) to the affected area not more than 3 to 4 times daily. Children under 12 years: ask a doctor.
